prompt: A dark, cinematic anime villain poster in an ultra-detailed gothic horror style, arranged as a single dramatic collage against a ruined infernal city. Use a wide landscape composition with a black, crimson, and electric violet palette, heavy smoke, ash, embers, magical lightning, and chaotic painterly energy. Feature 4 major villain figures. In the center foreground, a massive obese pirate emperor with a huge grin, wild black beard, open red captain coat, bare scarred chest and belly, layered necklaces, belt, and multiple pistols tucked at his waist, holding 2 flintlock pistols outward in a triumphant pose. Behind him at upper center, a tall pink muscular demon-like humanoid with a smooth head and a single curled head tentacle, standing with arms slightly spread, glowing with purple aura and lightning. On the left foreground, a pale long-haired Japanese swordsman in loose light robes, head bowed slightly, surrounded by a giant coiled serpent rising behind him with open mouth; add the vertical Japanese text "大蛇丸" near this figure and the vertical text "魔人ブウ" near the upper-center figure. On the right, a tall elegant demon lord in layered dark kimono-like robes, long flowing hair, calm sinister posture, framed by 8 smaller dark red moons plus 1 large full red moon above the head, for a total of 9 moons; add the vertical Japanese text "黒ひげ" near the pirate and "鬼舞辻無惨" near the right figure. The background should be a hellish apocalypse of shattered towers, burning ruins, and shadowy architecture fading into smoke. At the bottom, place huge aggressive brush-painted title text reading RISE OF VILLAINS in blood red with magenta highlights, rough torn edges, and glowing texture. Make the whole image feel like an epic crossover key art poster, extremely high contrast, ominous, supernatural, and menacing.
